slot_recall_set.identifier_label: Día de los Muertos & Holi trip plans
slot_recall_set.user_turn: I want to turn that festival calendar into actionable trip plans — for Oaxaca I'm aiming for late October to early November 2026 (about Oct 28 to Nov 7) and for India early to mid-March 2027 (about Mar 6 to Mar 16); I need to be back in Portland by 9:00 AM on November 12, 2026 for work. My Oaxaca budget is $2,400 per person and India $4,800 per person. I already have a guesthouse contact in Oaxaca — Casa Azul Guesthouse (Rosa Morales); I can share their contact details. Health notes: I'm allergic to penicillin and carry an EpiPen, my routine vaccines are up to date but I need to start a Hep A series before India, and I take lisinopril 10 mg (carry-on required). Can you recommend optimal travel windows, prioritized flight routings and a fare-monitoring strategy, 2–3 vetted lodging options with local contact details, a visa/vaccine and packing checklist (including meds and allergy plans), per-trip budgets and a step-by-step booking timeline with deadlines?
slot_recall_set.task_goal: Turn the multi-year festival calendar into detailed, actionable trip plans for Día de los Muertos in Oaxaca and Holi in India: recommend optimal travel windows, prioritized flight routings and fare-monitoring strategy, 2–3 vetted lodging options (with local contact details), a visa/vaccine and packing checklist tailored to the traveler, per-trip budgets, and a step-by-step booking timeline with deadlines.
